channel.title: Posts on Is this real life?
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Is this real life?

item.title: My academic projects & research
item.description: My last years at Universidad San Francisco de Quito (USFQ) are perpetuated in this section. As one of the first members of the Theoretical & Computational Mechanics Group I was involved in a wide ranging portafolio of projects. Is at this moment in my life that I really connected with my passion for technology.
item.content: My last years at Universidad San Francisco de Quito (USFQ) are perpetuated in this section. As one of the first members of the Theoretical & Computational Mechanics Group I was involved in a wide ranging portafolio of projects. Is at this moment in my life that I really connected with my passion for technology.
